subcodes.first_line: The letter which his honor Áqá Khalíl, upon him be the glory of God, had written unto you, was received in its entirety on the twenty-fifth night [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه که جناب آقا خلیل علیه بهاء الله بشما نوشته بودند بتمامه در لیل بیست و پنجم
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
